title: NAU Students Build a Camera Headed to Mars
description: A student-led team at NAU designed and built a dual-wavelength camera that will orbit Mars, capturing both visible and infrared data to unlock new insights about the planet.
imageAlt: Three New Investigations Headed to the Moon
meta: Mars Exploration • Student Innovation • Space Technology
impact: Radiant empowers students to work on real NASA missions, bridging education and industry by turning hands-on research into space-ready technology. Through projects like VISIONS, Radiant is accelerating innovation in remote sensing while preparing the next generation of engineers and scientists for planetary exploration.
